zh.Monk Fryston, Yorkshire, England, United: 英國英格蘭越可爾蒙克 福利斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: Cecily Palden是John Palden III和Lady Matilda Burley的女兒，於1350年出生在英國越可爾。她於1374年與Robert Rawson在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1415年在她的家鄉享年65歲。

zh-hans.Monk Fryston, Yorkshire, England, United: 英国英格兰越可爾蒙克 福利斯頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Cecily Palden是John Palden III和Lady Matilda Burley的女儿，于1350年出生在英国越可爾。她于1374年与Robert Rawson在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1415年在她的家乡享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Palden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from High Halden in Kent.

variants.name: Haldane
meanings: Scottish: from the Middle English and Older Scots personal name Haldan (Old Norse Halfdanr, Half(f)dan, Anglo-Scandinavian Healfdene, literally ‘half Dane’).
Scottish: shortened form of the Lanarkshire surname McCalden, probably from Mac Haldan ‘son of Haldan’, with the same meaning as 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Cecily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Cecily Palden was born in 1350, in Yorkshire, England as the daughter of John Palden III and Lady Matilda Burley. She married Robert Rawson in 1374, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1415, in her hometown, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Cecily Palden est née en 1350, à Everwyck, Angleterre, fille de John Palden III et Lady Matilda Burley. Elle a épousé Robert Rawson en 1374, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1415, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecily Paldenは1350年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでJohn Palden IIIとLady Matilda Burleyの娘として生まれた。1374年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでRobert Rawsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1415年に故郷で65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecily Palden(은)는 1350년 영국 요르크실르에서 John Palden III(와)과 Lady Matilda Burley의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1374년 영국 요르크실르에서 Robert Rawson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1415년 그녀의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Cecily Palden родилась в 1350 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. Её родителей звали John Palden III и Lady Matilda Burley. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Rawson в 1374 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1415 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 65 лет.
